title: The same newsletter hits 5 inboxes — summarized once. One malformed email fails — your digest still ships.

beats.name: cold-boot
beats.caption: the inbox graph lights up once · gateway → classifiers → threader → digest

beats.name: quiet
beats.caption: dim skip pulses · nothing changed · cost flat near zero

beats.name: self-tick
beats.caption: self-tick audit floor · the digest re-checks itself · no edges, no cost

beats.name: hero-dark-lane
beats.caption: HERO: one email lands in ONE inbox · only that classifier lane lights · the other 7 stay dark

beats.name: diamond-dedup
beats.caption: the SAME newsletter hits 4 more inboxes · the shared thread already rendered · 4 copies dedup away · summarized ONCE

beats.name: red-fail
beats.caption: a malformed email · its classifier fails RED · no downstream, no digest corruption · prior truth stands

beats.name: recover
beats.caption: the sender re-sends a fixed copy · the classifier flashes GREEN · its thread joins the digest

beats.name: final-quiet
beats.caption: it goes quiet again · the digest shipped · cost back to flat
